Text.val: the company id paramete is only used by the caselist
program to tell if it is a user from the Andrew Agency

SQL_STMT_U.val: SELECT dbo.Agent_Sid_User_Log.Sid, dbo.Agent_Sid_User_Log.Name_ID FROM dbo.Agent_Sid_User_Log WHERE dbo.Agent_Sid_User_Log.Sid=:1

Header.Description: get hash from agent sid table

SQL_STMT_U.val: SELECT dbo.Agent_Sid_User_Log.Sid, dbo.Agent_Sid_User_Log.Login_ID, dbo.Agent_Sid_User_Log.Name_ID FROM dbo.Agent_Sid_User_Log WHERE dbo.Agent_Sid_User_Log.Sid =:1

FormName.valUnicode: get hash from agent sid table

SQL_STMT_U.val: SELECT WebLoginCredential.NameId, WebLoginCredential.WebUserID, WebLoginCredential.Hash FROM WebLoginCredential WHERE WebLoginCredential.NameId = ':1'

FormName.valUnicode: read sid hash roster for contact info

SQL_STMT_U.val: select Sid,Login_ID,Login_date,CONVERT(TIME, Login_date) as Login_time, Name_ID from dbo.Agent_Sid_User_Log where Sid = :1
UPDATE Agent_Sid_User_Log SET Login_date = GETDATE() where Sid = :1
